s: In 2013, Edgar Olmos suited up for MIA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 7.200, WHIP 2.000, SO 2, WAR -0.200.
Changed teams after the previous season (MIA -> SEA).
In 2015, Edgar Olmos suited up for SEA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.500, WHIP 1.710, SO 4, WAR -0.100. Notable context: Joined SEA.
